title: Id and UTCDate duplicate identical newtype boilerplate
description: jmap.rs: Id and UTCDate are both String newtypes with identical implementations of new(), from_trusted(), as_str(), Display, AsRef<str>, Deref<Target=str>, PartialEq<str>, PartialEq<&str>, and the reverse PartialEq. The ~90 lines of implementation are copy-pasted with only the type name changed. Suggested rewrite: introduce a macro_rules! non_empty_string_newtype!(TypeName) that expands all the boilerplate once, then define Id and UTCDate as single-line invocations of that macro. This keeps the distinct types (no accidental interchangeability) while having one source of truth for the invariant and trait impls.
close_reason: Opinion: macro dedup for newtype boilerplate is preference, not a correctness or maintenance issue
